prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: SON-WETSTONE-SS73BG
Product Type: TOOLS
Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor
Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 8" Silicon Carbide Knife Sharpening Stone 180 240 Grit Double Sided Whetstone Knife Sharpener Block
Description: Bring your dull blades back to life with the Silicon Carbide Double Sided Sharpening Stone featuring 180 and 240 grit surfaces. Designed for fast, effective sharpening, this whetstone is ideal for restoring worn, chipped, or blunt edges on a wide range of tools and knives. Whether you're maintaining your kitchen cutlery or sharpening outdoor gear, this versatile sharpening block delivers consistent results every time.
</br></br>
The dual grit design allows you to start with the coarse 180 grit to quickly reshape and repair damaged edges, then transition to the 240 grit to refine and smooth the blade for improved cutting performance. Made from durable silicon carbide, this sharpening stone is engineered for efficient material removal while maintaining long term reliability.
</br></br>
Unlike traditional sharpening systems, this water stone requires no oil. Simply add water before use for a cleaner, more convenient sharpening experience. Its compact and portable design makes it easy to use at home, in the workshop, or out in the field, making it a dependable tool for campers, hunters, woodworkers, and everyday users.
</br></br>
Suitable for sharpening kitchen knives, outdoor knives, chisels, axes, scissors, gravers, and other hand tools, this all in one sharpening solution helps extend the life of your equipment and improve performance. Instead of replacing dull tools, restore them quickly and efficiently with a sharpening stone built for durability and versatility.
Search Terms: knife sharpener stone whetstone sharpening block water stone blade sharpener kitchen knife sharpening tool axe sharpener chisel sharpening stone scissor sharpener tool sharpener kit coarse grit sharpening stone outdoor survival gear knife maintenance honing stone
Features:
- RESTORE DULL BLADES FAST: Coarse 180 grit and medium 240 grit surfaces quickly sharpen dull, chipped, or worn edges, bringing knives, tools, and blades back to life with minimal effort
- RESTORE DULL BLADES FAST: Coarse 180 grit and medium 240 grit surfaces quickly sharpen dull, chipped, or worn edges, bringing knives, tools, and blades back to life with minimal effort
- RESTORE DULL BLADES FAST: Coarse 180 grit and medium 240 grit surfaces quickly sharpen dull, chipped, or worn edges, bringing knives, tools, and blades back to life with minimal effort
- DIMENSIONS RESTORE DULL BLADES FAST: Coarse 180 grit and medium 240 grit surfaces quickly sharpen dull, chipped, or worn edges, bringing knives, tools, and blades back to life with minimal effort- 8" x 2" x 1"
- DURABLE SILICON CARBIDE BUILD: High quality silicon carbide construction ensures long lasting performance and efficient material removal for fast edge restoration and smooth finishing sharpening blades, chisels, gravers, hand tools, hooks, knives, scissors, and more

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8" Silicon Carbide Double Sided Sharpening Stone

tokens.name: Silicon Carbide Double Sided Sharpening Stone

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8in Silicon Carbide Knife Sharpening Stone

anthropic.title_differentiation: 180 And 240 Grit, Water Stone, Restores Dull Blades Fast, Knives Chisels Axes Scissors

openai.title_differentiation: Coarse 180 Grit And Medium 240 Grit, Double Sided, Water Use, Fast Edge Repair, For Knives, Chisels, Tools
